description: PRD-006 — Infraestrutura e NFRs: health check, logs, LGPD, API padronizada, testes

userStories.title: Implementar health check endpoint
userStories.description: As a DevOps engineer, I need a health check endpoint to monitor the API.
acceptanceCriteria: Add GET /health public route (no auth required)
Return JSON: { status, checks: { database, redis }, timestamp }
Return 200 if healthy, 503 if any check fails

userStories.title: Adicionar request ID e logs estruturados
userStories.description: As a developer, I need traceable request IDs and JSON logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create RequestIdMiddleware that generates UUID and adds to Log context
Add X-Request-Id header to all responses
Configure JSON log channel in config/logging.php

userStories.title: Padronizar respostas de erro da API
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want consistent error responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Standardized error format: { error: { code, message, fields } }

userStories.title: Implementar LGPD — exportação de dados
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export all my personal data (LGPD compliance).
acceptanceCriteria: Export: profile, onboarding, goals, workout logs, meal logs, XP transactions, achievements, gamification

userStories.title: Implementar LGPD — exclusão de conta
userStories.description: As a user, I want to delete my account and all data permanently.
acceptanceCriteria: Require password confirmation in request body
Delete all user data across all tables

userStories.title: Criar testes de feature para autenticação
userStories.description: As a developer, I need feature tests for auth endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/Feature/Auth/RegisterTest.php — test registration success and validation
Create tests/Feature/Auth/LoginTest.php — test login success and failures
All tests pass with php artisan test

userStories.title: Criar testes unitários para GamificationService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for the gamification service.
acceptanceCriteria: Test grantDailyLoginXp — grants XP once per day
Test grantWorkoutCompletedXp — grants XP and increments count
Test checkLevelUp — promotes at correct thresholds
